column2: # 1. Формула для Pooled (с взаимодействиями округов, как в Таблице 6)
fmla_pooled <- current_score_t ~ INF + INH + INT + INLH + INLT +
# 2. Формула для отдельных округов (без взаимодействий с округом)
fmla_single <- current_score_t ~ INF + INH + INT + INLH + INLT +
mod_pool_elem <- feols(fmla_pooled, data = filter(bgs_age, elementary == 1), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_pool_mid  <- feols(fmla_pooled, data = filter(bgs_age, elementary == 0), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_bloom <- feols(fmla_single, data = filter(bgs_age, district == "Bloom"), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_ch_elem <- feols(fmla_single, data = filter(bgs_age, district == "CH" & elementary == 1), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_ch_mid  <- feols(fmla_single, data = filter(bgs_age, district == "CH" & elementary == 0), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_cps_elem <- feols(fmla_single, data = filter(bgs_age, district == "CPS" & elementary == 1), cluster = ~cluster_var)
mod_cps_mid  <- feols(fmla_single, data = filter(bgs_age, district == "CPS" & elementary == 0), cluster = ~cluster_var)
